title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Nestle India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Nestle India
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!
